title: HTTP 400 error when accessing Gemini API
symptom: When using the http_request node to access the Gemini API, a 400 error is returned. The same request works perfectly with curl.
root_cause: The http_request node is configured to use the GET method, which is not compatible with the Gemini API's requirements for this endpoint. The API expects a POST request with a JSON body, leading to the 400 error when the wrong method is used.
fix_steps: Change the 'Method' from GET to POST
Ensure the request body is correctly formatted as JSON
Save the workflow and execute it again
agent_instruction: Change the HTTP method to POST in the http_request node settings.
